summary.zh: 考斯沃斯 DFV 客户引擎让多支车队都有机会角逐冠军，但这也是 F1 历史上安全代价最沉重的十年之一——林特、塞维尔与彼得森相继在这十年中丧生；1978 年莲花 79 率先引入的地面效应设计，为下一个十年埋下伏笔。
summary.en: The Cosworth DFV customer engine let many different teams contend for the title, but this was also one of the deadliest decades in F1 history - Rindt, Cevert, and Peterson were all killed during it; the ground-effect design pioneered by the Lotus 79 in 1978 set up the decade that followed.
